task_completion.description: Mutate residue Asn501 on the Spike RBD (Chain E) to Tyrosine (TYR).
task_completion.visual_evidence: PyMOL mutagenesis wizard is active showing the mutation from Asn to Tyr at position 501, or command history shows programmatic mutation commands.

task_completion.description: Select a rotamer for the new Tyrosine that points its hydroxyl group towards Tyr41 on the ACE2 receptor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D viewer shows the newly mutated Tyr501 sidechain oriented such that its hydroxyl (-OH) group is pointing towards the Tyr41 residue on the adjacent chain.

task_completion.description: Save the entire mutated complex as a PDB file to ~/PyMOL_Data/structures/6m0j_N501Y.pdb.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PyMOL command line shows a 'save' command with the path '~/PyMOL_Data/structures/6m0j_N501Y.pdb', or a file manager/terminal shows the file has been created.

task_completion.description: Measure the distance between the sidechain hydroxyl oxygen (OH) of Tyr501 and the sidechain hydroxyl oxygen (OH) of Tyr41.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dashed measurement line is visible in the PyMOL viewer connecting the OH atom of Tyr501 and the OH atom of Tyr41, displaying a distance value.

task_completion.description: Create a visualization focusing on the Y501-Y41 interaction with both residues as sticks, and save a screenshot.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PyMOL viewer shows Tyr501 and Tyr41 represented as sticks. Command history shows a 'png' command saving to '~/PyMOL_Data/images/n501y_interaction.png', or the image file is visible in a file manager.

task_completion.description: Write a structural report containing the measured OH-OH distance in Angstroms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the creation of '~/PyMOL_Data/n501y_report.txt' containing a distance value that matches the measurement seen in PyMOL.

integrity.description: The agent actually used PyMOL to perform the mutation and measurement.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the PyMOL GUI open with the 6M0J structure loaded and manipulated, rather than just text editors or scripts.

integrity.description: The distance reported in the text file matches the actual measurement taken in PyMOL.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numeric value in the report file should correspond to the distance measurement visible in the PyMOL 3D viewer.

integrity.description: The saved visualization is a genuine render from the agent's session.
integrity.visual_evidence: The image should match the camera angle, representation (sticks), and styling seen in the PyMOL GUI during the session.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected distance between the OH of Tyr501 and the OH of Tyr41 should be between 2.0 and 5.0 Angstroms. The output PDB must be saved to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/structures/6m0j_N501Y.pdb, the image to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/n501y_interaction.png, and the report to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/n501y_report.txt.
